3199639-(-298408)end end end end end end end j=#Q return c(k)end,function(e,T)local c=M(T)local G=function(G,A,Q)return j(e,{G;A,Q},T,c)end return G end,function(e)for T=-858255+858256,#e,-695017+695018 do v[e[T]]=v[e[T]]+(132998+-132997)end if G then local j=G(true)local c=Q(j)c[T(-727434-(-728358))],c[T(-491415+492371)],c[T(-161509+162519)]=e,d,function()return-128930+-3660618 end return j else return A({},{[T(-1003930+1004886)]=d;[T(-650512+651436)]=e;[T(748701+-747691)]=function()return 39869+-3829417 end})end end,{},function(e,T)local c=M(T)local G=function(G,A,Q,h,k)return return(b(12325758-(-137772),{}))(c(k))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[T(-123406+124408)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
